caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His t-shirt features the white printed text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, a white male mannequin is visible, and several framed pictures hang on the wall. Two logos are present on the screen: one on the left featuring a red and black design and one on the right that reads "REALLY REALLY TOT". As the scene progresses, the man speaks, with his facial expressions shifting from a neutral gaze toward the camera to looking slightly to his right. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, while the camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment.
